subject: refactor: clean up keyboard handlers, complete print CSS, stabilize callbacks
body:
Systematic cleanup of all items flagged during burger menu review:

- App.jsx: Remove 3 redundant Escape handlers (shortcuts modal handled
  by native <dialog>, burger menu by useEscapeKey, reader mode moved to
  ReaderMode). Simplify keyboardRef from 14 to 8 values. Note: these
  used the ref pattern (not stale closures) — earlier analysis was wrong.
- ReaderMode: Own keyboard handling — useEscapeKey for exit, useEffect
  for arrow key page navigation with debugLog. Component only mounted
  when active so useEscapeKey(true, ...) always enabled.
- MobileLayout: Stabilize onClose with useCallback to prevent
  useEscapeKey listener re-attachment every render.
- Print CSS: Complete @media print rules — .no-print hide, white
  bg/black text, break-inside avoid.
- TODO.md: Remove incorrect stale closure entry and completed print
  CSS entry.
- Docs: Update CLAUDE.md, HISTORY.md, SESSION_NOTES.md.

Tags: refactor, a11y, keyboard, print-css, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: burger-menu
Semver: patch
